reviews.comment:
Simplemente cargué combustible y tomé un excelente café con un tostado ! Pero estuve muy cómoda y a gusto! Sanitarios impecables!
Tiene una cabañas muy pintorescas rodeadas de un hermoso paisaje!!!
Volveremos!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I simply filled up with gas and had an excellent coffee with a toasted sandwich! I was very comfortable and at ease! The restrooms were spotless!
It has very quaint cabins surrounded by beautiful scenery!
We'll be back!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsN3NlclhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de los playeros, es algo de todas las YPF!!! Se ve que la consigna es atender a desgano. Y no solo eso, ayer, paso con mi familia y uno de los playeros se me hizo el pesado autoritario, se ve que está disconforme con su lugar de trabajo, porque resulto ser un hombre muy mal educado.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the gas station attendants, it's a problem at all YPF stations! It seems like their policy is to serve customers half-heartedly. And not only that, yesterday I was with my family and one of the attendants was incredibly rude and authoritarian. He seems unhappy with his job, because he turned out to be a very ill-mannered man.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia nos podria pasar mas especificaciones sobre la situacion vivida .

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsNjRYWk9nEAE

reviews.comment:
OJO con este lugar!!. Cargue dos veces en un viaje al sur, de ida y de vuelta. Ambas naftas, Super e Infinita. Me rindió un 40% menos que lo habitual las dos veces. No volvería a cargar.

(Translated by Google)
Beware of this place!! I filled up twice on a trip south, both ways. Both times I bought Super and Infinita gasoline. Both trips resulted in 40% less mileage than usual. I wouldn't fill up there again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsNjVMSklBEAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene un lugar ,con buena sombra y mesas con sillones de madera para poder comer .

(Translated by Google)
It has a place with good shade and tables with wooden chairs where you can eat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsbzY2QXFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Desde hace muchos años cargo combustible en esta estación. Atienden muy bien y el lugar permite estacionar y descansar un rato.  Faltaría un mejor servicio de cafetería. De todos modos, es muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
I've been filling up at this station for many years. The service is excellent, and the place is convenient for parking and relaxing. A better café would be a welcome addition. Nevertheless, it's highly recommended.
